title: TotWM - Extra Towers (Wraith Waystones Compatibility)
description: Compatibility data pack between "Towers of the Wild Modded - Extra Towers" & "Wraith Waystones".
body:
## NOTE: FOR VERSIONS 1.21.1 AND ABOVE, THIS DATA PACK ALSO SUPPORTS THE TOWERS ADDED BY THE ORIGINAL [TOTWM](https://modrinth.com/mod/totw-modded) MOD. This is due to the unavailability of the [Towers of the Wild Modded: Fabric Waystones Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/towers-of-the-wild-modded-fabric-waystones-compat) data pack for said versions.

This is a data pack that establishes compatibility between [Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones) and [Towers of the Wild Modded - Extra Towers.](https://modrinth.com/datapack/towers-of-the-wild-modded-extra-towers)

It makes the towers generate waystones from Wraith Waystones instead of the regular [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) mod, that's about it.

![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KJ5K4heB/images/ff0beebff57c947af80e77e37e5b4c319acdf89e.png)

### Best paired with [Towers of the Wild Modded: Fabric Waystones Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/towers-of-the-wild-modded-fabric-waystones-compat)

## Other recommended resources:
- [Global Packs mod by JTK222](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)
